questions.question: What is the 17th Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) target related to 'Partnerships for the Goals') and how can individuals contribute to it? Please provide a possible action (2 marks) and explain its significance (3 marks).

The 14th SDG target is 'Life Below Water'. What are some possible actions individuals can take to help conserve marine ecosystems? (2 marks) Please provide one significant example and explain its impact (3 marks).

The 12th SDG target is 'Responsible Consumption and Production'. How can individuals contribute to reducing waste and promoting sustainable consumption? Please provide two possible actions (4 marks) and explain their significance in achieving this target (1 mark).
